description.value:
Archetype

Your Armament Haki has reached the level where you can emit it outward from your weapon rather than merely coating its surface — a technique that bypasses even the most hardened defenses.

When you use Armament Haki, the benefits are further improved:

  • The bonus damage increases to +1d10.
  • The physical resistance increases to your level.
  • Your Strikes bypass physical resistances entirely, with no cap. You can harm creatures who are immune to physical damage if that immunity comes from a natural or supernatural source (such as a Logia Devil Fruit), though you cannot bypass immunity to physical damage from magic (such as stoneskin).
  • Armament Pulse: Once per round when you make a Strike with Armament Haki active, you may choose to emit a pulse of hardened Haki. The attack gains a +5-foot reach as the pulse extends beyond the weapon's edge, and on a hit the target must succeed at a Fortitude save (DC = your class DC) or be pushed 5 feet directly away from you.
description.gm: The immunity bypass is specifically for physical-type immunities that exist in the One Piece fiction (Logia intangibility, certain creature types) — it is NOT intended to bypass magic-sourced immunities like stoneskin or heavy metal constructs. Clarify this to your players. The Armament Pulse is a fun knockback option but should feel optional — players who just want to deal damage should feel no pressure to track it.
